satire_attempt: Today on Tech Buddhism: Stop chasing promotions, comrade. The promo packet is samsara. The launch tweet is karma. Your demo-week deck is rebirth in the realm of the slide-makers. Real engineers reject all visibility. They post nothing. They demo nothing. They simply ARE.
verdict_reason: The satire requires the verse to dismiss promo / demo / launch work as inferior, but the verse explicitly says 'the cycle works ... the bhoga-aiśvarya-gati is real' and 'a staff engineer who never participates in director-visible work is not therefore a buddhi-yogin; they may simply be unskilled at organisational legibility.' The falsifiability clause names the satirical inversion and rejects it. The verse is about the constitutive shift, not the participation. The satire collapses.
